scores.correctness_notes: Fully covers all gold standard content: oci-image type, description field, filename for file type only, and the critical container/resource name matching rule.
scores.hallucination_notes: The sections on 'Supplying the image at deploy time' and 'Publishing an OCI image to Charmhub' (charmcraft upload-resource with --image flag, registry fallback behavior) go beyond the gold standard and may contain details not verifiable against it, though they appear plausible for charmcraft tooling.
